understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level, avoiding spike tiles which cause failure. There are 2 attempts per level, each with 50 turns. I need to complete levels efficiently.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement: I can move left, right, or click on a tile. Gravity is always DOWN, meaning after a click that removes a tile below me, I fall straight down. Clicks: Clicking on a clickable tile removes it; if I am above, I fall to the lowest empty space in that column. Hazards: Spike tiles end the run if landed on. Turns: Each action consumes 1 turn; I have 50 turns per attempt. Undo: Not observed in this episode. The level is 2D grid-based with coordinates.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level, avoiding spike tiles which cause failure. There are 2 attempts per level, each with 50 turns. I need to complete levels efficiently.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement: I can move left, right, or click on a tile. Gravity is always DOWN, meaning after a click that removes a tile below me, I fall straight down. Clicks: Clicking on a clickable tile removes it; if I am above, I fall to the lowest empty space in that column. Hazards: Spike tiles end the run if landed on. Turns: Each action consumes 1 turn; I have 50 turns per attempt. Undo: Not observed in this episode. The level is 2D grid-based with coordinates.
